description: Legal document fragment, probably late 11th century, since witnessed by Yakhin b. Netanel who also signed T-S 13J5.2 ca.1085. Other witnesses: Shemuel b. Mevorakh; Avraham [...]; and Maṣliaḥ [...]. Verso contains a few jottings in Arabic and Judaeo-Arabic. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
